narrative:
Liberty Twp township has 5,997 registered voters, with 50.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.0 percentage points.
